g.title: public.vehicles:ownerId->public.users:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY ("ownerId") REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.bookings:customerId->public.users:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY ("customerId") REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT

g.title: public.bookings:vehicleId->public.vehicles:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY ("vehicleId") REFERENCES vehicles(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT

g.title: public.reviews:userId->public.users:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY ("userId") REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.reviews:vehicleId->public.vehicles:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY ("vehicleId") REFERENCES vehicles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.transactions:walletId->public.wallets:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY ("walletId") REFERENCES wallets(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT

g.title: public.wallets:userId->public.users:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY ("userId") REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
